unresolveds: Whether the system-wide MHS visiting-student / VSLO program applies to Memorial Regional Hospital (Hollywood) specifically. Indirect proof exists (MRH is the named flagship in the careers block, requirements page says rotations may span multiple hospitals) but no direct campus-applicability sentence. Requires campus carveout verification before any PUBLIC_SAFE_USCE publish.

sourceFamily for mhs.net/education/undergraduate-medical-education is tagged GME_PAGE in source metadata while content is clearly Undergraduate Medical Education / visiting students. Family re-classification needed upstream.
Many claimIds collide across sources (c1, c2, c3, sc1 reused). Downstream dedupe must key on (sourceUrl, claimId) tuple.

A4TargetedRecoveryTasks.reason: VSLO/visiting-student program is system-wide; need explicit campus-applicability proof that Memorial Regional Hospital Hollywood hosts visiting students.
A4TargetedRecoveryTasks.suggestedNarrowAction: Narrow re-read of /education/undergraduate-medical-education and its child pages for sentences naming 'Memorial Regional Hospital' or 'Hollywood' as a rotation site; check Rotation Dates child page if present.

A4TargetedRecoveryTasks.reason: Explicit negative quote 'We do not accept students for observerships or shadowing, no exceptions' was downgraded to FUTURE_LANE_ONLY; meets EXPLICIT_NEGATIVE_QUOTE + STRONG criteria for PUBLIC_SAFE_NO_PUBLIC_OPPORTUNITY on the IMG_OBSERVERSHIP lane once campus-applicability is confirmed.
